race.comment: COMIC CULTURE (7) was backed into $1.35 last start and held on by the skin of his teeth to win first-up. Straight to a CL2 today, but he draws inside again and should be better for the fresh run. Wouldn't surprise to see him raise the bar again and bring up back-to-back wins. NEESON (6) just missed behind Atmospheric Rock first-up before a strong performance in Highway company last time out. Much easier here and he can roll forward from the draw. Still has plenty of upside and can strike third-up. LONDON BOY (8) races well at this track and trip and won't be far away. STORMFIELD (5) comes back in grade today and looks ready to fire second-up.
